queue_item.action: Build a deterministic non-authoritative manifest over the dated continuity index and explicitly supplied standalone continuity records.

progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed locally using byte-identical source and test content before commit.
progress.claim_boundary: The builder is bounded to explicit inputs, emits authoritative=false, and does not claim complete repository enumeration.

queue_item.handoff: Use an authenticated repository tree traversal to enumerate operations/continuity/records, invoke the builder with the explicit sorted file list, retain the resulting manifest and source map as CI evidence, and reject any duplicate IDs until reviewed.
